head: a73906d

p75_blocker_summary.reason: Both Batch A strategies already cover all 1500 available POWER_LOTTO draws (101000002-115000040). No draws beyond 115000040 exist in DB. P74 apply script would produce 0 eligible rows.

ingestion_readiness_detail: Official Taiwan Lottery API is the canonical source. Fetcher infrastructure is in place. Estimated 2 new draws (115000041 on 2026-05-21, 115000042 on 2026-05-25) should be available but have not been ingested. A dry-run fetch must be performed before any controlled import.

required_ingestion_gates.description: Fetch MUST use official API: api.taiwanlottery.com/TLCAPIWeB/Lottery/SuperLotto638Result. No manually fabricated draw data allowed.
sqlite3 backup of lottery_v2.db required before any draw insert. Filename must include branch name and timestamp.
Run official API fetch in dry-run mode (no DB write). Verify returned draw data matches expected schema: lotteryType=POWER_LOTTO, draw=integer string, date=YYYY/MM/DD, numbers=list[6], special=int.
For each candidate draw: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM draws WHERE lottery_type='POWER_LOTTO' AND draw=? must return 0 before insert.
Each draw must have: lottery_type='POWER_LOTTO', draw=6-digit string starting with '115', date in 'YYYY/MM/DD' format, numbers=sorted list of 6 integers 1-38, special=integer 1-8.
lottery_type must exactly equal 'POWER_LOTTO'. Reject DAILY_539 or BIG_LOTTO rows from POWER_LOTTO ingestion gate.
Ingestion must use a unique controlled_import_id (e.g. P76_POWERLOTTO_DRAW_INGEST_20260526) to ensure idempotency and auditability.
After import, verify draws table count for POWER_LOTTO increased by exactly the number of new draws inserted. Also verify CAST(draw AS INTEGER) > 115000040 now returns > 0.
Run scripts/replay_lifecycle_drift_guard.py --strict after ingestion to confirm replay table integrity.
Run scripts/replay_branch_governance_guard.py --expected-rows 46960 after draw ingestion (before P74 apply). Replay rows must remain 46960 until P74 apply runs.

p75_plan_regeneration_requirements.trigger: After new POWER_LOTTO draws are ingested AND prediction engine generates prediction_items for those draws

steps.action: Verify draws table: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM draws WHERE lottery_type='POWER_LOTTO' AND CAST(draw AS INTEGER) > 115000040 returns > 0
Generate prediction_items for fourier_rhythm_3bet and fourier30_markov30_2bet for each new draw > 115000040
Run dry-run: .venv/bin/python scripts/p74_batch_a_controlled_apply.py --dry-run. Confirm eligible_rows > 0 and 0 duplicate controlled_apply_ids.
Obtain authorization phrase: 'YES apply P71 controlled replay rows'
Verify rows = 49960 (46960 + 1500 fourier_rhythm_3bet + 1500 fourier30_markov30_2bet for new draws)
